_publications._publicationTitle: Optical dopamine monitoring with dLight1 reveals mesolimbic phenotypes in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Peak analysis was performed to identify local trace prominences and revealed that the dopamine transient event rate was reduced in Nf1+/- mice
details: Used for peak analysis of baseline dLight1.2 recordings to identify local trace prominences and quantify dopamine transient events
